raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "There will be a state audit focused on homeless youth in California.",
    "The audit will examine data and practices related to homeless youth.",
    "The audit will analyze a selection of Local Educational Agencies (LEA) that report zero homeless students.",
    "The audit aims to provide local schools with critical tools to reduce the risk of homeless youth becoming homeless adults.",
    "This will be the first audit on the subject of homeless youth conducted by the California State Auditor."
  ]
}
```
